flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Huston-Tillotson University rose 82% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.7k → $26.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Huston-Tillotson University rose 82% between 2021 and 2024 ($14.7k → $26.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Huston-Tillotson University rose 35% between 2021 and 2024 (20.0% → 27.1%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Huston-Tillotson University fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($34.5k → $30.8k).
